mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if I fell from a ladder at work in West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer if I fell from a ladder at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Utah is an exclusive remedy state; workers' comp is your only recourse against employer for ladder falls unless gross negligence or intentional act proven, which is rare.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Code §34A-2-105 bars third-party lawsuits against employers for on-job ladder falls. Exceptions require clear proof of intentional harm. Focus on maximizing comp claim instead. In West Valley City, third-party suits possible against ladder manufacturers or faulty site owners.

name: Can You Sue After a Work Ladder Fall in West Valley City?
description: No, Utah is an exclusive remedy state; workers' comp is your only recourse against employer for ladder falls unless gross negligence or intentional act proven,
